title: anthemis microcephala
intro: Anthemis microcephala, also known as small-headed chamomile, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which have been utilized to treat various health issues such as anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Anthemis microcephala include its ability to soothe digestive issues, calm nervous system, and relieve menstrual cramps, among others. In herbal preparations, the flowers of the plant are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve sleep quality.
